title: LLM-as-a-Judge
description: Master the concept of 'LLM-as-a-Judge' for automated evaluation of model outputs. Architect automated evaluation frameworks that use powerful models (e.g., GPT-4o, Claude 3.5) to grade the accuracy, safety, and style of smaller model outputs.
objectives: Master the concept of 'LLM-as-a-Judge' for automated evaluation of model outputs.
Architect automated evaluation frameworks that use powerful models (e.g., GPT-4o, Claude 3.5) to grade the accuracy, safety, and style of smaller model outputs.
